WITH cust_2013 AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date LIKE '2013-%'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_total AS (
    SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM cust_2013
),
filtered AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment, total_consumption
    FROM cust_2013
    WHERE total_consumption = (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_total)
)
SELECT
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM filtered;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH monthly_euro AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           strftime('%Y', ym.Date) AS year,
           SUM(ym.Consumption * t.Price) AS euro_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
        AND strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date)
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, year
),
seg_totals AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           SUM(CASE WHEN year = '2012' THEN euro_consumption ELSE 0 END) AS total_2012,
           SUM(CASE WHEN year = '2013' THEN euro_consumption ELSE 0 END) AS total_2013
    FROM monthly_euro
    GROUP BY Segment
),
growth AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           CASE WHEN total_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE ((total_2013 - total_2012) * 100.0 / total_2012)
           END AS pct_growth
    FROM seg_totals
)
SELECT Segment AS segment_with_max_growth, pct_growth AS growth_percent
FROM growth
WHERE pct_growth IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_growth DESC
LIMIT 1

UNION ALL

SELECT Segment AS segment_with_min_growth, pct_growth AS growth_percent
FROM growth
WHERE pct_growth IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_growth ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

    AND c.birth_date = (
      SELECT MIN(birth_date)
      FROM client
      WHERE gender = 'F'
        AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM low_salary_districts)
    )
)
SELECT DISTINCT d.account_id
FROM disp d
JOIN oldest_female_clients ofc ON d.client_id = ofc.client_id;	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT AVG(l.amount)
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'A'
  AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';	----- bird -----	financial
497:
SELECT
    c.client_id,
    c.gender,
    c.birth_date,
    (strftime('%Y','now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) -
        (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d','now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS age,
    ca.card_id,
    ca.type AS card_type,
    ca.issued
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold';	----- bird -----	financial

FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE dist.A2 = 'Восточной Богемии'
